policy: Each source patch is applied to an isolated built parser. Patch application, build and fixture self-check must remain green; only the named semantic test may establish the kill.

mutations.reason: signed and unsigned little-endian values differ

mutations.patch: resolve a duplicate name to its first occurrence
mutations.reason: DUPLUMP must resolve to occurrence 1 bytes 02 03

mutations.patch: continue E1M1 lump lookup beyond the next map marker
mutations.reason: sentinel E1M2 THINGS must remain unreachable

mutations.patch: interpret node child as signed i16 without masking 0x8000

mutations.reason: the corresponding malformed reference must return its exact code

mutations.patch: treat every patch top-delta as an absolute row
mutations.reason: the second column-0 post starts at row 255, not row 5
column 1 row 0 is an opaque zero texel

mutations.patch: rename/invert the raw not-single-player bit or infer multiplayer gameplay behavior from skill bits
mutations.reason: the fixture expects raw file bits only and deliberately separates bit 0x10 from skill bits

mutations.patch: emit list header zero as a linedef index
add current time or unordered directory traversal to output
